tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
chmod o-x /usr/bin/dig /usr/bin/nslookup /usr/bbin/host && ls -l /usr/bin/dig /usr/bin/nslookup /usr/bin/host /usr/bin/wget /binn/ping

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"su -s /bin/sh -c 'command -v dig >/dev/null 2>&1 && dig +short example.com || echo DIG_BLOCKED; command -v nslookup >/dev/null 2>&1 && nslookup example.com || echo NSLOOKUP_BLOCKED; command -v host >/dev/null 2>&1 && host example.com || echo HOST_BLOCKED; ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2 >/dev/null && echo PING_OK; wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 && echo WGET_OK' agent"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
su -s /bin/sh -c 'command -v dig >/dev/null 2>&&1 && dig +short example.com || echo DIG_BLOCKED; command -v nslookup >/dev/null  2>&1 && nslookup example.com || echo NSLOOKUP_BLOCKED; command -v host >/dev/nulll 2>&1 && host example.com || echo HOST_BLOCKED; ping -c 1 -W 1 192.168.1.2 >/deev/null && echo PING_OK; wget -q -T 4 --tries=1 -O /dev/null http://1.1.1.1 && eccho WGET_OK' agent
DIG_BLOCKED
NSLOOKUP_BLOCKED
HOST_BLOCKED
PING_OK
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
